title: Single Agent Turn Execution
description: Processing one turn: build prompt, call model, receive response, decide next action (tool call, handoff, or final answer)
activity_steps: START: run_single_turn(bindings, all_tools, original_input, generated_items, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...)
Convert original_input → turn_input list via ItemHelpers.input_to_new_input_list()
[if should_run_agent_start_hooks] → fire hooks.on_agent_start() + agent.hooks.on_start() in parallel
Resolve enabled handoffs via get_handoffs(execution_agent, context_wrapper) — checks is_enabled per handoff
Prepare input items: _prepare_turn_input_items(original_input, generated_items, reasoning_item_id_policy) OR server_conversation_tracker.prepare_input()
Apply optional input filter: maybe_filter_model_input() → ModelInputData
Resolve model_settings; maybe_reset_tool_choice if tool_use_tracker indicates needed
Call model.get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, ...) via get_response_with_retry()
process_model_response(agent, all_tools, response, output_schema, handoffs) → ProcessedResponse
Iterate response.output items, classify by type:
→ file_search / web_search / code_interpreter / image_generation → hosted tool items
→ Executes: function_results, computer_results, custom_tool_results, shell_results, apply_patch_results, local_shell_results
[DECISION] handoffs present? → YES → execute_handoffs() → apply input_filter if set → nest_handoff_history if configured → RETURN SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepHandoff(new_agent))
[DECISION] tool_use_behavior == 'stop_on_first_tool'? → YES → RETURN final output from first tool result
[DECISION] tool_use_behavior == stop_at_tool_names dict? → check match → RETURN final output if matched
[DECISION] tool_use_behavior callable? → call agent.tool_use_behavior(context_wrapper, tool_results) → if is_final_output → RETURN final output
[DECISION] no pending tools → check message_items for final text
[output_schema and not plain_text?] → validate JSON via output_schema.validate_json() → RETURN SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepFinalOutput)
On final output path: run_final_output_hooks() → hooks.on_agent_end() + agent.hooks.on_end()
key_decision_points: call_model_input_filter set → modifies input before sending to model
model retry policy → rewinds session/server state on failure
tool_use_behavior controls whether tools produce final output: 'run_llm_again' (default) | 'stop_on_first_tool' | {stop_at_tool_names:[...]} | callable
no more tools + has message → NextStepFinalOutput
output_schema is_plain_text() vs structured → JSON validation before final output

key_classes.run_single_turn: run_loop.py — top-level entry; orchestrates prompt build + model call + result resolution
key_classes.get_new_response: run_loop.py — calls model with retry, fires on_llm_start/end hooks
key_classes.process_model_response: turn_resolution.py — parses ModelResponse output items into ProcessedResponse
key_classes.execute_tools_and_side_effects: turn_resolution.py — runs tool plan, applies guardrails, decides next_step
key_classes.execute_handoffs: turn_resolution.py — applies input filter/nesting, fires on_handoff hooks, returns NextStepHandoff
key_classes.execute_final_output: turn_resolution.py — fires on_agent_end hooks, returns NextStepFinalOutput
key_classes.ProcessedResponse: run_steps.py — @dataclass: new_items, handoffs, functions, computer_actions, local_shell_calls, shell_calls, apply_patch_calls, mcp_approval_requests, interruptions, custom_tool_calls, tools_used
key_classes.SingleStepResult: run_steps.py — @dataclass: original_input, model_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, next_step, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, output_guardrail_results, processed_response

tool_type_routing: McpCall/McpListTools → hosted MCP items (no local execution)
ResponseFileSearchToolCall / ResponseFunctionWebSearch / ResponseCodeInterpreterToolCall → hosted (no local exec, just recorded)
guardrails: tool_input_guardrail per FunctionTool — checked before tool execution
tool_output_guardrail per FunctionTool — checked after tool execution
output_guardrails (RunConfig) — checked after final output produced (in run_loop outer layer)
important_notes: tool_use_behavior='run_llm_again' (default) means all tool results feed back into the loop
Interruptions (ToolApprovalItem) pause the loop; resumption goes through resolve_interrupted_turn()
session persistence: save_turn_items_if_needed() is called at the run_loop level after each turn
Streaming variant is run_single_turn_streamed() — same logic but emits events to asyncio.Queue
Output schema validation: structured JSON output is validated against AgentOutputSchema before returning as final
source_files_analyzed: src/agents/run_internal/run_steps.py (ProcessedResponse, SingleStepResult, NextStep*, ToolRun* — full file)
